name: cowork-data-persist-probe
description: Tests whether a value persisted to $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA from a plugin-level SessionStart hook (host side) survives across Cowork chat sessions. The write + read-back runs in the hook (not the skill body) because on Mac Cowork only the host hook has CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA set; the VM Bash tool has it unset. The hook appends a per-session marker and surfaces the accumulated history so cross-session persistence can be read directly from the SessionStart context.
